changes.proposed: Column-faithful extraction preamble (copy qty/price/total from columns only; descriptions never override; prefer null over guessing)
changes.rationale: Eliminates CRITICAL contradiction with L122; removes root cause of pack-multiplier errors

changes.current: But DO infer quantity/unit when clearly present inside product names. Screenshots may have messy OCR. Use contextual reasoning.
changes.rationale: Direct cause of POMODOR *6, Aceto *2, Rulo *2, Ginger Beer 24 errors

changes.current: 7 retail pack examples teaching *N as purchased qty (Coca-Cola 33cl Pack 24, BAD/GOOD 33cl, etc.)
changes.proposed: NEGATIVE EXAMPLES block (POMODOR CX*6, Aceto 5l*2, Rulo 1kg*2, Ginger Beer) + POSITIVE EXAMPLES (Bidfood MO/EM, Aviludo 33cl*24 with column=24)
changes.rationale: Retail examples generalize to wholesale CX*N; negative examples anchor correct behavior

changes.proposed: Move to conditional: only when NO quantity column visible → null (or post-process whitelist)
changes.rationale: Prevents description overriding column; accepts null regression risk on butcher invoices

changes.proposed: Salada with unit EM and quantity column '1' → quantity: 1 (column-faithful)
Reject lot/expiry sub-lines; one row per visible product; never reconstruct from lot numbers
Add explicit column-boundary rule: do not read numerics from description into price fields; weight ranges (4-4,25KG) are not prices

changes.current: Extract all invoice line items from this restaurant invoice table image.
changes.proposed: Extract each visible invoice line item. Copy quantity, unit price, and total from their table columns only.
changes.rationale: Align user message with column-faithful system prompt; reduce extract-all pressure

optionalPostPromptGuards.guard: Row-count check vs geometry Pass B expected count
Reject rows matching /Lote\s*\d|Data\s*Exp/i without product name
Flag qty×unit_price ≠ total beyond tolerance when all three non-null
optionalPostPromptGuards.note: Would catch Ginger Beer 24×€0.85 semantic error even if prompt fails

deploymentSequence: 4. Re-extract all 6 VL invoices (persistence-audit: DB is stale for 6/7 problem rows)
5. Run field-accuracy + hallucination audits to validate projection
6. Add Mammafiore regression fixture: assert 8 items, no /Olio|Lote 609/i
